brand.name: Memorialize
brand.heroTitle: Personalized gifting, reimagined with AI previews and handcrafted 3D prints.
brand.heroSubtitle: One-stop experience: create profile → generate concepts → approve final design → print and deliver.

howItWorks.title: Create Gift Profile
howItWorks.desc: Add recipient details, occasion, personality, hobbies, and references.

howItWorks.title: Generate AI Concepts
howItWorks.desc: View multiple visual directions that simulate final product outcomes.

howItWorks.title: Finalize & Customize
howItWorks.desc: Select model style, size, finish, engraving, and packaging.

howItWorks.title: Print & Ship
howItWorks.desc: Production starts after approval, followed by secure tracked delivery.

categories.name: Portrait Figurines
categories.desc: Custom person-centric models with expressive facial details.

categories.name: Anniversary Editions
categories.desc: Romantic poses and elegant base engraving for milestone gifts.

categories.name: Team & Farewell Gifts
categories.desc: Professional desk keepsakes for managers, founders, and teams.

categories.name: Parents & Siblings
categories.desc: Story-backed models for birthdays and emotional celebrations.

categories.name: Pet Memory Pieces
categories.desc: Meaningful sculpted tributes for pet companions and memorial moments.

categories.name: Seasonal Collections
categories.desc: Limited festive themes for Diwali, New Year, and wedding season.

testimonials.name: Megha A.
testimonials.quote: The preview looked beautiful, but the final print was even better in person.

testimonials.name: Varun P.
testimonials.quote: This is the first gift where everyone asked me where I got it from.

testimonials.name: Ankit & Rhea
testimonials.quote: Very smooth flow from profile to delivery. Felt premium throughout.

faq.a: Previews are close visual directions; final model goes through manual quality refinement before printing.
Yes, you can request edits before approving the print-ready design.
Usually 5–8 business days depending on style complexity and location.

faq.q: Can this support COD or partial advance?
faq.a: Yes, the checkout layer can be configured for your preferred payment workflow.

previews.title: Elegant Professional
previews.desc: Studio-lit desk figurine style with hand-painted details and premium finish.

previews.title: Warm Family Style
previews.desc: Soft expression, natural palette, and sentimental base engraving layout.

previews.title: Creative Character
previews.desc: Fun hobby-forward pose inspired by custom FDM and resin 3D printed minis.

previews.title: Classic Couple Edition
previews.desc: Dual figurine concept with synchronized outfits and anniversary plinth text.

stories.title: Chef Marco Tribute
stories.text: A culinary team converted years of gratitude into a desk-ready keepsake.

stories.title: Dr. Ananya Celebration
stories.text: A custom model with a stethoscope motif and family message engraving.

stories.title: Rohan Sports Edition
stories.text: Action-pose figurine styled with team colors and date marker.

stories.title: First Dance Keepsake
stories.text: Wedding memory transformed into a timeless physical collectible.

about.mission: Memorialize helps people celebrate relationships through custom visual storytelling and premium 3D crafted gifts.

values.title: Emotion First
values.desc: We start with human stories, then design around emotion and memory.

values.title: Craft + Technology
values.desc: AI for speed, human quality checks for final print excellence.

values.title: Premium Delivery
values.desc: A thoughtful unboxing journey from first click to final reveal.

defaults.storyPrompt: A warm smile, stethoscope prop, and elegant pastel outfit for a milestone birthday gift.

customization.notes: Slight smile enhancement and stethoscope detail on the coat.
